metadata.title: Social Income
metadata.description: Change from human to human. From mobile to mobile.

section-2.text-3.1: Identifying those in need: Through collaboration with local NGOs in Sierra Leone, we target individuals living in poverty who can benefit from a three-year predictable income, empowering them to invest in their future.
section-2.text-3.2: Selecting randomly: Our randomized selection process is transparent and publicly verifiable, eliminating human biases and favoritism. This ensures fairness and equal chances for all individuals in poverty to benefit.
